playerWidth.description: The width of the video player. Full-screen video fills the width of the device, that is, if the video can play in full screen mode, the player width is the screen width.

playerHeight.description: The height of the video player. Full-screen video fills the height of the device, that is, if the video can play in full screen mode, the player height is the screen height.

mediaId.description: A unique (not random) value that identifies the content video aligned with the ad opportunity. Typically provided by the video player CMS.

mediaUrl.description: The URL to the content video source.

mediaTitle.description: The title of the content video aligned with the ad opportunity.

contentLength.description: The length of the content video in seconds.

srcPageUrl.description: The url of the page where the video ad will be displayed.

floor.description: This is a formatted string of values. The format is a comma separated list of "currency pairs". Each pair consists of a currency code and the floor for that currency, separated by a colon.

efloor.description: Same as floor, except the entire string is encrypted using HMAC encryption and the encryption keys set on the supply's seat from the SSP UI.

custom.description: Any custom value that will be later be available for reporting.

categories.description: Validated against RTB table 6.1 (Send comma delimited list if more than one category applies.

keywords.description: Comma separated list of keywords describing the supply.

srcRelationship.description: Describes the relationship between the content owner and the requestor of the ad opportunity. 1 for "direct", 0 for "indirect"

blockDomains.description: A comma separated list of advertiser domains that should be added to the existing list of blocked advertiser domains that is set in the SSP console.

skip.description: Is the video skippable? True or false. 1/T/Y is true and 0/F/N/null is false.

skipmin.description: Shortest video ad (in seconds) that can be skipped. If provided and "skip" is not, then "skip" is automatically set to true.

skipafter.description: Number of seconds after which the video can be skipped. If provided and "skip" is not, then "skip" is automatically set to true.

delivery.description: Comma delimited listed of Integers representing allowed delivery methods. See below as well as RTB 2.5 specification for valid values.

placement.description: Integer value of placement type. See below as well as RTB 2.5 specification for valid values.

minDur.description: Minimum duration for an ad in seconds

maxDur.description: Maximum duration for an ad in seconds
